narration: Plastic doesn’t disappear; it just breaks down.

narration: Microplastics are tiny plastic fragments invading our oceans, lurking in every corner.
visual_description: Context visual: Microplastics are tiny plastic fragments invading our oceans, lurking in every corner.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Microplastics are tiny plastic fragments invading our oceans, lurking in every corner.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Microplastics are tiny plastic fragments invading our oceans, lurking in every corner.

narration: They travel up the food web, from plankton to fish… and even into our plates.
